response.justification: Candidate is a senior individual contributor with strong full-stack craftsmanship but lacks the executive leadership profile required for a CTO role. No evidence of scaling engineering teams from 10 to 30+, no senior technical leadership tenure, and no production multi-agent AI systems experience. Fintech exposure is limited (RIDE Capital, ~1 year) and not at infrastructure depth. AI work is described as 'contributing to' MCP tooling rather than architecting production agentic systems. Significant gap between profile and the executive, AI-native fintech CTO mandate.
strengths: Strong polyglot engineering background across web, backend, and distributed systems
Some exposure to AI-agent infrastructure and MCP tooling at re:cinq
Prior fintech experience at RIDE Capital with TDD/CI/CD discipline
concerns: No executive or CTO-level leadership experience; no record of scaling teams to 30+
No demonstrated production multi-agent AI systems ownership at architectural level
Limited regulated fintech infrastructure depth (credit risk, liquidity, compliance)

key_factors.factor: Lack of executive leadership and team scaling track record
No production multi-agent AI architecture experience
